summary: Iteration 32: Verified TokenCalculatorSummary.jsx refactoring (1575 → 445 lines). All extracted sub-components working correctly: SiteTableRow.jsx, SizingTableHeader.jsx, SizingDialogs.jsx, SizingExports.js. Pure refactoring with no behavior changes confirmed.
passed_tests: Navigate to customer detail page via eye icon - PASS
Click 'Sizing' tab in sidebar to open sizing calculator - PASS
Sizing table loads with correct columns (Location, # IPs, KW, Role, Services, DHCP Partner, Srv#, Platform, Model, Tokens, Rpt, BOM) - PASS
'Add Site' button works - new row appears with default values - PASS
'Export Drawing' button is visible and clickable - PASS
'Show Hardware SKU' checkbox toggles Hardware SKU column - PASS
'?' help icon opens 'Why this model?' dialog with detailed sizing breakdown - PASS
Save functionality works - changes trigger FloatingSaveButton, 'Saved' toast appears - PASS

Re-exports for backward compatibility in main component
